label: Research project
description: Defines a node on the research tree that unlocks technology when completed.

baseCost.label: Base cost
baseCost.description: Research points required to complete this project before speed modifiers.

prerequisites.label: Prerequisites
prerequisites.description: ResearchProjectDef references that must be completed before this project becomes available.

hiddenPrerequisites.label: Hidden prerequisites
hiddenPrerequisites.description: Like prerequisites, but hidden from the UI until unlocked.

techLevel.label: Tech level
techLevel.description: TechLevel enum value restricting which colonies can research this project.

requiredResearchBuilding.label: Required research building
requiredResearchBuilding.description: ThingDef reference for the research bench required to study this project.

requiredResearchFacilities.label: Required research facilities
requiredResearchFacilities.description: ThingDef references for facility buildings that must be adjacent to the research bench.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: ResearchProjectTagDef references used for grouping or conditional effects.

tab.label: Research tab
tab.description: ResearchTabDef reference controlling which tab this project appears on in the research UI.

researchViewX.label: Research view X
researchViewX.description: Horizontal position of this node on the research tab grid.

researchViewY.label: Research view Y
researchViewY.description: Vertical position of this node on the research tab grid.

discoveredLetterTitle.label: Discovered letter title
discoveredLetterTitle.description: Title of the letter shown when this research project is completed.

discoveredLetterText.label: Discovered letter text
discoveredLetterText.description: Body text of the letter shown when this research project is completed.

discoveredLetterDisabledWhen.label: Discovered letter disabled when
discoveredLetterDisabledWhen.description: Difficulty conditions under which the discovered letter is suppressed.

techprintCount.label: Techprint count
techprintCount.description: Number of techprints that must be applied before this project can be researched.

techprintCommonality.label: Techprint commonality
techprintCommonality.description: Relative frequency at which techprints for this project appear in trade stock.

techprintMarketValue.label: Techprint market value
techprintMarketValue.description: Base market value of a techprint for this project.

heldByFactionCategoryTags.label: Held by faction category tags
heldByFactionCategoryTags.description: Faction category tag strings identifying factions that can hold techprints for this project.

hideWhen.label: Hide when
hideWhen.description: Difficulty conditions under which this research project is hidden from the research tree.

requiresMechanitor.label: Requires mechanitor
requiresMechanitor.description: If true, a mechanitor must be present in the colony to research this project.

requiredAnalyzed.label: Required analyzed
requiredAnalyzed.description: ThingDef references for items that must have been analyzed before this project unlocks.

recalculatePower.label: Recalculate power
recalculatePower.description: If true, triggers a recalculation of the power grid when this research is completed.

knowledgeCategory.label: Knowledge category
knowledgeCategory.description: KnowledgeCategoryDef reference controlling which anomaly knowledge track this research belongs to.

knowledgeCost.label: Knowledge cost
knowledgeCost.description: Amount of knowledge points consumed from the associated category to unlock this project.

teachConcept.label: Teach concept
teachConcept.description: ConceptDef reference for the tutorial lesson taught when this research is completed.

generalRules.label: General rules
generalRules.description: Free-form rule set object used by the faction ideology system for unlocking this project.

requireGravEngineInspected.label: Require grav engine inspected
requireGravEngineInspected.description: If true, a gravity engine must have been inspected before this project can be researched. Odyssey expansion.

customUnlockTexts.label: Custom unlock texts
customUnlockTexts.description: List of localized strings shown in the research completed notification.

basic-research.label: Basic research project
basic-research.description: Research project with a base cost and tech level.
